title: The King of Fighters 2002 UM Gameplay Map

narrative.description: The King of Fighters 2002 UM (2002) is a acclaimed fighting title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Read opponent patterns, land combos, and deplete the rival's health bar.
